015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonCreator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;
020import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
021import org.bitcoinj.base.BitcoinNetwork;
022import org.bitcoinj.base.Network;
023import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
024
025import java.math.BigDecimal;
026
027/**
028 * POJO for `getblockchaininfo` RPC response.
029 */
030public class BlockChainInfo {
031    private final String      chain;
032    private final int         blocks;
033    private final int         headers;
034    private final Sha256Hash  bestBlockHash;
035    private final BigDecimal  difficulty;
036    private final BigDecimal  verificationProgress;
037    private final byte[]      chainWork;
038
039    @JsonCreator
040    public BlockChainInfo(@JsonProperty("chain")            String chain,
041                          @JsonProperty("blocks")           int blocks,
042                          @JsonProperty("headers")          int headers,
043                          @JsonProperty("bestblockhash")        Sha256Hash bestBlockHash,
044                          @JsonProperty("difficulty")           BigDecimal difficulty,
045                          @JsonProperty("verificationprogress") BigDecimal verificationProgress,
046                          @JsonProperty("chainwork")            byte[] chainWork) {
047        this.chain = chain;
048        this.blocks = blocks;
049        this.headers = headers;
050        this.bestBlockHash = bestBlockHash;
051        this.difficulty = difficulty;
052        this.verificationProgress = verificationProgress;
053        this.chainWork = chainWork;
054    }
055
056    /**
057     *
058     * @return a short string identifying which chain (Note: this differs from {@link BitcoinNetwork#toString()}
059     */
060    public String getChain() {
061        return chain;
062    }
063
064    public int getBlocks() {
065        return blocks;
066    }
067
068    public int getHeaders() {
069        return headers;
070    }
071
072    public Sha256Hash getBestBlockHash() {
073        return bestBlockHash;
074    }
075
076    public BigDecimal getDifficulty() {
077        return difficulty;
078    }
079
080    public BigDecimal getVerificationProgress() {
081        return verificationProgress;
082    }
083
084    public byte[] getChainWork() {
085        return chainWork;
086    }
087
088    /**
089     * Map a BlockChainInfo chain string to a Network. These strings are different from the standard values
090     * in {@link BitcoinNetwork#toString()}.
091     * @param info {@code BlockChainInfo}
092     * @return the matching network.
093     */
094    public static Network chainToNetwork(BlockChainInfo info) {
095        Network network;
096        switch(info.getChain()) {
097            case "main":
098                network = BitcoinNetwork.MAINNET;
099                break;
100            case "test":
101                network = BitcoinNetwork.TESTNET;
102                break;
103            case "signet":
104                network = BitcoinNetwork.SIGNET;
105                break;
106            case "regtest":
107                network = BitcoinNetwork.REGTEST;
108                break;
109            default:
110                throw new RuntimeException("BlockChainInfo contains unrecognized Bitcoin network");
111        }
112        return network;
113    }
114
115    /**
116     * Map {@link BitcoinNetwork} to a chain-id string.
117     * Bitcoin Core returns strings that differ from {@link BitcoinNetwork#toString()}.
118     * @param network bitcoinj enum type
119     * @return Bitcoin Core-compatible <q>chain</q> string
120     */
121    public static String networkToChainName(BitcoinNetwork network) {
122        String name;
123        switch(network) {
124            case MAINNET:
125                name = "main";
126                break;
127            case TESTNET:
128                name = "test";
129                break;
130            default:
131                name = network.toString();
132                break;
133        };
134        return name;
135    }
136}
